subject: a large griffin standing on a rocky cliff edge, wings spread wide, against a golden sunset sky
description: A griffin — a large creature with an eagle's head and wings on a lion-like body — stands on a rocky outcropping facing left with wings dramatically spread. The plumage is dark with lighter undersides visible on the wing fans. The sky is a vivid warm gradient of amber, orange, and gold with cloud formations, and distant rocky canyon walls frame the background. A smaller winged creature is visible in the background mid-distance. The composition is a full mid-shot, emphasizing the griffin's wingspan against the sky.
foreground: large dark griffin with spread wings on a rocky perch
background: amber and orange sky, rocky canyon formations
